nonBlockingIssues.description: Code duplication of format_status/1 and is_winner?/2 helper functions across market_detail_live.ex and market_list_live.ex. This pattern was continued from the prior voting milestone.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Already tracked in misc-voting-code-hygiene-followups feature for deduplication.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Defensive nil check for current_user in UserDashboardLive is unnecessary since the LiveView is behind ensure_authenticated on_mount.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Remove the dead code path in a future cleanup.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Notifications show unread indicators but there's no UI to mark them as read when clicked. The schema and context support read state (read field, mark_notification_read/1), but the feature doesn't expose this to users.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Consider adding mark-as-read functionality in a future iteration for better UX.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Market Resolution Patterns section documenting the majority/tie outcome determination pattern from the automatic-market-resolution-engine feature.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed the pattern of preloading associations in context queries
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in architecture.md under test helpers and form patterns - common Elixir pattern

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly invoked elixir-expert skill before implementing code changes
rejectedObservations.reason: standard skill procedure - no need to document routine workflow steps

rejectedObservations.observation: No new services or ports were introduced
